system.environment: A winter of industrial smoke, gaslight, and river fog presses close upon the East End.
system.culture: Respectability and desperation share the same narrow streets, divided by class, accent, and opportunity.
system.socialClimate: Rumours of disappearances trouble workhouses, docks, and charitable societies alike.

antagonist.name: The Pallid Circle
antagonist.concept: A clandestine society exploiting poverty and scientific curiosity.
antagonist.motivations: The circle seeks influence through fear, patronage, and controlled public scandal.

system.motivations: Expose the pattern behind the disappearances before the guilty can bury their evidence.
